name: Turkey
description: Straddling Europe and Asia, Turkey controls the Bosphorus Strait — the only sea passage between the Black Sea and the Mediterranean — giving it irreplaceable strategic leverage within NATO. Its Bayraktar TB2 drone program has changed modern warfare and generated significant export influence. Erdogan's neo-Ottoman foreign policy has Turkey simultaneously in NATO, buying Russian S-400 systems, and mediating between Russia and Ukraine. This strategic ambiguity is both a strength and a liability. Nuclear weapons hosted under NATO sharing arrangements give Ankara nuclear status without formal ownership.
